extraction.one_line_summary: THOMAS Geraint set best time of 16:04 in a time trial, beating teammate KIRYIENKA by 7 seconds
tactical_patterns: Sky placed three riders in top four positions, revealing depth-based strategy for flat short TTs
Thomas went third-best at intermediate but fastest at finish, indicating superior pacing strategy

rider_signals.THOMAS Geraint: positive: Produced surprise best time despite being third at intermediate, showing better TT form than expected
rider_signals.KIRYIENKA Michal: neutral: Strong ride at 7 seconds down confirms Sky TT depth but beaten by GC rider
